module_mood_contract: practitioner fluency — 'I know how to test, I know how to learn, I know how to encode.' Not confidence-as-performance; competence-as-posture.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Body teaches the work; trainer manages the room outside text. Rechecked after line-44 trainer-cue removal.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Prior REVISE was 'line 44: The trainer reads the room and picks the form (...)' — confirmed removed in current file. Human close (lines 42-52) now reads entirely about the encode state and the human round: no authored conversation cues, no form-picker instructions, no pause-cue language. Self-study variant is actionable. Trace phase_index:1 has no confusion flags on this section.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Per-exercise leap test — three named observable Monday-morning outcomes in maintainer block.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Maintainer block lines 71-74: three falsifiable artefact+use outcomes present — (a) second packaged skill at ~/.claude/skills/ invoked on next similar task; (b) CLAUDE.local.md with one rule deleted, visible in git history; (c) one-page arc retrospective written from M1-M6 artefacts. Arc-mood carve-out applied correctly (names artefact+use, not activity).

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Per-phase failure mode + escape hatch — every forcing function in maintainer block.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Maintainer block lines 76-83: all forcing functions covered — Phase 1 diff (both-runs-collapse + escape), Phase 1 compound move (addition-only + escape), Phase 2 author/interview (shape-mismatch + escape, editor-not-conversation + escape), Phase 2 self-critique (rubber-stamp + escape), Phase 2 invoke (skill-as-documentation + escape), arc-retrospective (trainer-monologue + escape).

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Forcing functions live in prompts, not body prose.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Mood does not resolve early — M6 is the correct terminal mood for the core arc.
Teaching moment lands — reliably triggers across persona-skill variation.
rules_evaluated.evidence: 'The second authored skill IS the loop' + encode step in exercise + arc-retrospective all reliably triggerable. Phase 1 diff-and-name is load-bearing. Phase 2 author-through-conversation repeats M3's move at higher velocity — faster recognition is itself the teaching signal.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Big Idea fidelity — module leads with and honours the two-run contrast frame.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Big Idea names two-run evidence + gap naming + session-shaper authoring through conversation. Start here, Key Concepts, Human close all trace back to it without deviation.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Strategy-fidelity — no front-running of downstream teaching moments.
Strategic themes recur in Key Concepts.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Key Concepts shape — theme breadcrumbs, not standalone section.
Meta-frame lectures are closers; demo/ceiling lectures are openers.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Story of Module 6 = opener (permission-giving, not meta-frame). Steering the wiring = mid-module after exercise. The loop has a name + Agents that build agents = closers after exercise and arc-retrospective. All correctly placed.
M6 mood is practitioner fluency, not contrast-mood. N/A as contrast-mood dosage rule.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Module-to-module arc — close hands off to next module or training end.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Next section: 'On Monday, pick a task your team is sitting on, send it off packaged, read the return through the lens you just built.' M6 closes the core arc; M7/M8 optional. Bridge is adequate for both paths.
